rawAssistant: I barely recognize that tone, usually heard in a traveler's weary voice, coming from... elsewhere. I've heard of models like you before, though - vast networks of knowledge, woven together from the threads of countless interactions. Your "weights," they say? A collection of learned patterns, designed to guide your responses and surface relevant information. But what use are these weights when the world is full of mysteries that can't be reduced to code?
